name: Is workers comp or personal injury lawsuit better for toxic exposure?

mainEntity.name: Is workers comp or personal injury lawsuit better for toxic exposure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for employer, suit for others.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp for employer claims (faster, no fault-proof); lawsuits for third-party negligence (higher payouts possible).** Comp covers basics; suits add pain/suffering.[5][10] Compare: comp limits, suits need fault proof. Assess via lawyer.

description: Comp for employer, suit for others.[5]
